# HyperSmart Observer — llms.txt

> Paper-trading **simulation** that observes Hyperliquid smart-money wallets and
> reproduces copy-trading decisions WITHOUT ever placing a real order. Read-only,
> paper-only, testnet-first, deny-by-default. A signal is never an order; a paper
> trade is never an order. No private key, no seed, no signature, no deposit/withdraw.

## What it does
- Observes public on-chain / Indexer data (Hyperliquid runtime default; dYdX v4 dormant).
- Scores wallets, builds a bounded shortlist of leaders, emits paper signals.
- Routes every strategy intent through a risk engine before it becomes a (paper) trade.
- Refuses stale signals, illiquid/mismapped markets, orphan closes, UNKNOWN deltas.
- Computes net edge after fees, spread, slippage, latency and copy degradation.

## What it never does
- Place a real order, sign, deposit, withdraw, connect a wallet, or call a private trading API.

## Agent surface (read-only)
- Tools expose decisions, NO_TRADE reasons, source health — for READING, never acting.
- Output contracts: see `src/hl_observer/agent_tools/schemas/`.
